race.comment: Wide open race and pressure on from the outset. RED HOT LIZZIE (13) drew off the track and got home late in town two back then just missed last time at Rockhampton. Going well and can go one better. OUTBACK ACTION (14) is hard to fault winning back-to-back races. Hit the line hard to score here last time and looks tough to stop again. YES DREAM (2) is going well over the sharper trips but has performed well this journey before. Veteran drawn for a good run and should be in the thick of it. PARADE GROUND (9) deserves a win but will need some luck early from wide out. LIBERTY STEPS (8) is better than form suggests and will be winding up late.
